attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WI_DRR_GEO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI_DRR_GEO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 WI_DRR_GEO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 WI_DRR_GEO.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
 WI_DRR_GEO.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 WI_DRR_GEO.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,  
 WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 WI_DRR_GEO.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
 WI_DRR_GEO.REASON_DESCR,
 WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 WI_DRR_GEO.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_REP_NUM ,
 WI_DRR_GEO.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
 WI_DRR_GEO.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  WI_DRR_GEO.PROCESS_TYPE,
  'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
NULL AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_GEO_ACCOUNT_MATCH WI_DRR_GEO
 QUALIFY  SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT)  OVER(PARTITION BY BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ORDER BY REASON_DESCR ) = 100

SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'COMMERCIAL'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
   WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE      
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'COMMERCIAL'
   
   UNION 
   
 SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'COMMERCIAL'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   /* WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE  */
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE  in ( 'SMALL','PUBLIC SECTOR','SMB') /* added PUBLIC SECTOR as part of July 2020 CR*/
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
  
  UNION 
  
  SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'OTHER'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   /* WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE  */
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('COMMERCIAL','OTHER','PUBLIC SECTOR','SMALL','SMB')
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')

   UNION 
   
   SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'PUBLIC SECTOR'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   /* WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE  */
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('SMALL','OTHER','PUBLIC SECTOR','COMMERCIAL','SMB') /*Added as part of july 2020 cr*/
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
   
   UNION  /*below select is added as part of july 2020 cr*/
   
   SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'SMALL'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   /* WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE  */
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('SMALL','PUBLIC SECTOR','COMMERCIAL','SMB')
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
   
   UNION
   
   SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE = 'SMB'
    /*Added as part of May12 release*/
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   /* WHERE RSH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE = RSH_RST.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE  */
   AND RSH_RST.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN ('SMALL','PUBLIC SECTOR','COMMERCIAL','SMB')
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
   
   UNION
   
   SELECT
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    ,      
   ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   ,      
   ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,             
   -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
   ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
   ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR,
   GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
   GEO_ACCNT.SALES_REP_NUM,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM
  ( SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST,FIN_ADJ_KEY,PROCESS_TYPE
      FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH 
     WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N') ENRICH
  INNER JOIN 
  ( SELECT 
         CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
      SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
         ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
         SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
         SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
      SALES_REP_NUM
     FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY 
    WHERE SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_TYPE_CD = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
  ) GEO_ACCNT
     ON ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = GEO_ACCNT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  
    --AND ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = GEO_ACCNT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
     ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
    AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
     ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH_RST
      ON GEO_ACCNT.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = RSH_RST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('GA_SINGLE')
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.RULES_MATRIX RM , $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY  N_PARTY
 WHERE  RM.FROM_ATTRIBUTE ='PARTY_ID' and N_PARTY.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = RM.TO_ATTRIBUTE 
 AND ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY= N_PARTY.PARTY_KEY
AND RM.EXCEPTION_SCENARIO_TYPE='GEO_PARTY_ID' AND RM.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y')

SELECT
  ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,      
  ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ,      
  ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
  ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
  ENRICH.REASON_DESC AS REASON_DESC_END_CUST ,             
  -999 AS NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT ,
  -999 AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
  ENRICH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
  -999 SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
  100 AS SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT ,
  ENRICH_SAV.REASON_DESCR AS REASON_DESCR ,
  NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY ,
  NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM ,
  -999 AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  'N' AS GEO_PROCESSED_FLG,--to check if the GEO_ACCOUNT records are processed to Final table
  ENRICH.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
  ENRICH.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM ( SEL * FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_PARTY_ENRICH WHERE RULE_PROCESS_FLAG='N')ENRICH
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
 ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV
   ON ENRICH_SAV.BK_REASON_CD IN ('NM_BKGS')
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ENRICH.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,ENRICH.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,ENRICH.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ORDER BY ENRICH.REASON_DESC,ENRICH.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY )=1

SELECT 
WI_DRR_GEO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
WI_DRR_GEO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
WI_DRR_GEO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
WI_DRR_GEO.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
WI_DRR_GEO.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
WI_DRR_GEO.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,  
WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
WI_DRR_GEO.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
WI_DRR_GEO.REASON_DESCR,
WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
WI_DRR_GEO.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
WI_DRR_GEO.SALES_REP_NUM ,
WI_DRR_GEO.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
WI_DRR_GEO.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
WI_DRR_GEO.PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
NULL AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_GEO_ACCOUNT_ROUND_OFF WI_DRR_GEO
